text: Wait before I forget — the Chinese food I ordered last night was ABYSMAL. Like genuinely the worst meal of my life. I’m STILL annoyed thinking about it.
OH WAIT — I just remembered I got tickets to see my favorite artist next month and I’m genuinely losing my mind over it.
Hold on — I just realized I forgot to reply to an important email from days ago and now I’m panicking about what they must think.
This is random but I just saw a raccoon stealing cat food off someone’s porch and I honestly can’t stop laughing about it.
I accidentally sent a message to the wrong person earlier and I still want to disappear from embarrassment.
Ugh sorry but my group project partner is driving me INSANE. He’s done nothing for two weeks and somehow I’m the bad guy.
My dog finally learned how to give high-fives today and I was so excited I literally called my mom about it.
I just realized I might be late for something important and my heart is pounding right now.
Honestly at this point my life feels like a badly written sitcom.
I tripped carrying coffee this morning and had to sit through class smelling like a latte.
Did you see that video of the CEO screaming at employees? I’ve been doomscrolling about it for an hour and it makes me furious.
My sister just told me she’s pregnant and I genuinely cannot stop smiling about it.
I just checked my bank account and now I’m stressed because I completely forgot a payment was due.
This is unrelated but I’ve somehow ended up watching cooking videos for like three straight hours lately.
I waved at someone earlier because I thought they recognized me but they were waving at the person behind me.
The customer service person I spoke to earlier was unbelievably rude and I’m still irritated about it.
I started rewatching my favorite childhood show again and it weirdly made my whole week better.
I had a sudden moment earlier where I genuinely felt like everything was spiraling out of control.
I saw someone trying to carry six pizzas at once earlier and the entire situation looked like a cartoon.
Lately I’ve just been feeling kind of emotionally drained, even over really small things.
